events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: It's only when I hear the sounds of shuffling feet and supplies being put away that I realize that the lecture's over.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Professor Eileen's lectures are usually interesting, but today I just couldn't concentrate on it.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I've had a lot of other thoughts on my mind...thoughts that culminate in a question.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: It's a question that I've been meaning to ask a certain someone.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: When we come out of the university, I spot her right away.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I've known Sylvie since we were kids. She's got a big heart and she's always been a good friend to me.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: But recently... I've felt that I want something more.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: More than just talking, more than just walking home together when our classes end.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Hi there! How was class?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Good...

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I can't bring myself to admit that it all went in one ear and out the other.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Are you going home now? Wanna walk back with me?

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Sure!

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: After a short while, we reach the meadows just outside the neighborhood where we both live.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: It's a scenic view I've grown used to. Autumn is especially beautiful here.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: When we were children, we played in these meadows a lot, so they're full of memories.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Hey... Umm...

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: She turns to me and smiles. She looks so welcoming that I feel my nervousness melt away.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I'll ask her...!

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Ummm... Will you...

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Will you be my artist for a visual novel?

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Silence.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: She looks so shocked that I begin to fear the worst. But then...

events.speaker: Me
events.text: It's a kind of videogame you can play on your computer or a console.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Visual novels tell a story with pictures and music.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Sometimes, you also get to make choices that affect the outcome of the story.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: So it's like those choose-your-adventure books?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Exactly! I've got lots of different ideas that I think would work.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: And I thought maybe you could help me...since I know how you like to draw.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: It'd be hard for me to make a visual novel alone.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Well, sure! I can try. I just hope I don't disappoint you.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: You know you could never disappoint me, Sylvie.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: It's like an interactive book that you can read on a computer or a console.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Interactive?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: You can make choices that lead to different events and endings in the story.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: So where does the "visual" part come in?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Visual novels have pictures and even music, sound effects, and sometimes voice acting to go along with the text.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: I see! That certainly sounds like fun. I actually used to make webcomics way back when, so I've got lots of story ideas.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: That's great! So...would you be interested in working with me as an artist?

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: I'd love to!

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: And so, we become a visual novel creating duo.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Over the years, we make lots of games and have a lot of fun making them.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Our first game is based on one of Sylvie's ideas, but afterwards I get to come up with stories of my own, too.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: We take turns coming up with stories and characters and support each other to make some great games!

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: And one day...

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Hey...

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Yes?

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Will you marry me?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: What? Where did this come from?

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: Come on, how long have we been dating?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: A while...

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: These last few years we've been making visual novels together, spending time together, helping each other...

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: I've gotten to know you and care about you better than anyone else. And I think the same goes for you, right?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Sylvie...

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: But I know you're the indecisive type. If I held back, who knows when you'd propose?

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: So will you marry me?

events.speaker: Me
events.text: Of course I will! I've actually been meaning to propose, honest!

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: I know, I know.

events.speaker: Me
events.text: I guess... I was too worried about timing. I wanted to ask the right question at the right time.

events.speaker: Sylvie
events.text: You worry too much. If only this were a visual novel and I could pick an option to give you more courage!

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: We get married shortly after that.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Our visual novel duo lives on even after we're married...and I try my best to be more decisive.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: Together, we live happily ever after even now.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: {b}Good Ending{/b}.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I can't get up the nerve to ask right now. With a gulp, I decide to ask her later.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: But I'm an indecisive person.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I couldn't ask her that day and I end up never being able to ask her.

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: I guess I'll never know the answer to my question now...

events.speaker: Narrator
events.text: {b}Bad Ending{/b}.
